transcript_title: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D5 Mission Report Arabian Gulf 2020
text: GENTEXT/UAP - Description: (S//REL) AT 1354Z, OBSERVED 1X UAP IVO 34SCE7566990098. VELOCITY WAS 40 KNOTS AT FL160 TO FL170. UAP SPEED REMAINED CONSTANT. GENTEXT/UAP - Description: (S//REL) AT 2243Z, OBSERVED 2X POSS UAPS IVO 35TQK1580995057. VELOCITY WAS ESTIMATED AT 278 KNOTS. UAPS INCREASED SPEED AND CHANGED DIRECTION TOWARDS THE SOUTH. (b) (6)
